Sure, you could hang some run-of-the-mill feeder in your yard and admire them from afar, or you could guarantee an up-close-and-personal experience that won’t scare them away – plus, there’s the option to subscribe and get in-depth, AI-supported facts, too. The Wansview Smart Bird Feeder with camera fills the need as a great addition to any tech lover’s or birder’s backyard, and it’s seeing some Father’s Day savings (including a bonus extra savings code) that brings things down to the lowest price of 2026 so far.

items.summary:
LEGO Technic NASA Artemis Space Launch System Rocket set

Buy for $48 (Reg. $60)

What we love

If you are an astronomy lover, a STEM builder, or just love the Technic theme in general, this LEGO set is a great steal while down at a new $48 low price. Stacking up to 632 pieces, you’ll recreate a brick-built rendition of the NASA Artemis rocket, complete with its three-stage separation design: solid rocket boosters, core stage, then upper stage with Orion spacecraft.
